notes:
Works in black/white and color.

11x17 format printer.

Variants: Cse, Cxi.

Various options for pnm2ppa are available.

Make sure that you have at least version 1.0.4 of pnm2ppa so that 11x17 paper is supported.

Consumables/Refills: cartridge

drivers.name: pnm2ppa
drivers.comments:
This driver is available in the Ghostscript Printer Application

Color driver for PPA DeskJets. It can run PPA printers at 600dpi in color or mono. In the version 1.0.4 many bugs are fixed. All paper sizes known to Ghostscript up to 11x17 (DeskJet 1000C) are supported.

There is an installer package to use this driver under Mac OS X.

IMPORTANT: This is a driver for "host-based" printing: its output should usually be streamed directly to a local printer port on the same host that runs the driver. The output may be large: writing it to disk (as PDQ does) is also not recommended. (PDQ users should not use the PDQ-matic-generated driver because of this. A correct PDQ driver is supplied with pnm2ppa).
